question_tagalog: Anong trait mo yung pinaka-proud ka?
question_english: What trait of yours are you most proud of?
quote_tagalog: Maging proud ka sa kung sino ka.
quote_english: Be proud of who you are.

question_tagalog: Ano yung biggest lesson na natutunan mo this year?
question_english: What's the biggest lesson you learned this year?
quote_tagalog: Bawat araw ay bagong pagkakataon para matuto.
quote_english: Every day is a new opportunity to learn.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo na-feel na you really love yourself?
question_english: When did you feel that you really love yourself?
quote_tagalog: Ang self-love ay nagsisimula sa pagtanggap.
quote_english: Self-love begins with acceptance.

question_tagalog: Ano yung habit na gusto mong baguhin sa sarili mo?
question_english: What habit do you want to change about yourself?
quote_tagalog: Kaya mong magbago araw-araw.
quote_english: You can change every day.

question_tagalog: Anong part ng personality mo ang gusto mong mas i-improve?
question_english: Which part of your personality do you want to improve more?
quote_tagalog: Walang perpekto, pero pwede tayong maging better.
quote_english: Nobody is perfect, but we can be better.

question_tagalog: Paano mo hina-handle yung sarili mo pag na-iistress ka?
question_english: How do you handle yourself when you're stressed?
quote_tagalog: Huminga ka lang, lilipas din yan.
quote_english: Just breathe, this will pass.

question_tagalog: Anong compliment yung pinaka-tumatak sayo?
question_english: What compliment stuck with you the most?
quote_tagalog: Mga simpleng salita, malaking epekto.
quote_english: Simple words, big impact.

question_tagalog: Ano yung bagay na ginagawa mo just for your own peace of mind?
question_english: What's something you do just for your own peace of mind?
quote_tagalog: Protektahan mo ang peace mo.
quote_english: Protect your peace.

question_tagalog: Paano mo gino-goal na maging better partner and person?
question_english: How do you aim to be a better partner and person?
quote_tagalog: Lalago tayo nang sabay.
quote_english: We will grow together.

question_tagalog: Anong pinaka-brave na ginawa mo para sa sarili mo?
question_english: What's the bravest thing you did for yourself?
quote_tagalog: Tapang ang magdadala sayo sa pangarap mo.
quote_english: Courage will lead you to your dreams.

question_tagalog: Ano yung insecurity mo dati na natanggap mo na ngayon?
question_english: What was an insecurity before that you accept now?
quote_tagalog: Maganda ka sa sarili mong paraan.
quote_english: You are beautiful in your own way.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo naramdaman na enough ka na?
question_english: When did you feel that you are enough?
quote_tagalog: Sapat ka, at laging magiging sapat.
quote_english: You are enough, and will always be.

question_tagalog: Ano yung personal goal mo aside sa relationship natin?
question_english: What's your personal goal aside from our relationship?
quote_tagalog: Support ko lahat ng pangarap mo.
quote_english: I support all your dreams.

question_tagalog: Paano ka nagre-recharge pag ubos na energy mo?
question_english: How do you recharge when your energy is drained?
quote_tagalog: Pahinga muna, hindi pagsuko.
quote_english: Rest for a while, not quitting.

question_tagalog: Anong bagay ang nagpapasaya sayo easily?
question_english: What thing makes you happy easily?
quote_tagalog: Sa simpleng bagay lang, masaya na.
quote_english: Happy with just the simple things.

question_tagalog: Paano mo nakikita yung sarili mo 5 years from now bilang individual?
question_english: How do you see yourself 5 years from now as an individual?
quote_tagalog: Ang future mo ay maliwanag.
quote_english: Your future is bright.

question_tagalog: Ano yung pagkakamali mo na thankful ka kasi nangyari?
question_english: What mistake are you thankful happened?
quote_tagalog: Lessons turn into blessings.
quote_english: Lessons turn into blessings.

question_tagalog: Anong bagay ang nagagawa mo ngayon na akala mo di mo kaya dati?
question_english: What can you do now that you thought you couldn't before?
quote_tagalog: Mas malakas ka kaysa sa akala mo.
quote_english: You are stronger than you think.

question_tagalog: Paano mo pinapakita yung self-love on a daily basis?
question_english: How do you show self-love on a daily basis?
quote_tagalog: Mahalin mo muna ang sarili mo.
quote_english: Love yourself first.

question_tagalog: Ano yung greatest realization mo about life lately?
question_english: What's your greatest realization about life lately?
quote_tagalog: Maikli ang buhay, piliing maging masaya.
quote_english: Life is short, choose to be happy.

question_tagalog: Anong pangarap mo nung bata ka na totoo na ngayon?
question_english: What childhood dream of yours has come true now?
quote_tagalog: Unti-unting natutupad ang mga pangarap.
quote_english: Dreams are slowly coming true.

question_tagalog: Paano nag-change yung perspective mo about love nung tumanda ka?
question_english: How did your perspective on love change as you grew older?
quote_tagalog: Ang pag-ibig ay mas lumalalim sa panahon.
quote_english: Love deepens with time.

question_tagalog: Ano yung ginagawa mo para i-maintain yung mental health mo?
question_english: What do you do to maintain your mental health?
quote_tagalog: Importanteng alagaan ang isip at puso.
quote_english: It's important to care for the mind and heart.

question_tagalog: Anong kanta ang nag-dedescribe ng current phase ng buhay mo?
question_english: What song describes the current phase of your life?
quote_tagalog: Bawat kanta ay may sariling kwento.
quote_english: Every song has its own story.

question_tagalog: Ano yung bagay na lagi mong ipinagpapasalamat araw-araw?
question_english: What is something you are always thankful for every day?
quote_tagalog: Grateful heart attracts simple joy.
quote_english: A grateful heart attracts simple joy.

question_tagalog: Anong advice yung ibibigay mo sa younger self mo?
question_english: What advice would you give to your younger self?
quote_tagalog: Wag masyadong magmadali, magiging okay din lahat.
quote_english: Don't rush too much, everything will be okay.

question_tagalog: Paano mo iha-handle kapag feel mo na-burnout ka na?
question_english: How do you handle it when you feel burned out?
quote_tagalog: Okay lang mapagod, wag lang susuko.
quote_english: It's okay to get tired, just don't quit.

question_tagalog: Ano yung nagpapabigay sayo ng hope kahit mahirap ang buhay?
question_english: What gives you hope even when life is hard?
quote_tagalog: Laging may liwanag sa dulo.
quote_english: There is always light at the end.

question_tagalog: Ano yung greatest strength mo as a person?
question_english: What is your greatest strength as a person?
quote_tagalog: Ang lakas mo ay nasa puso mo.
quote_english: Your strength is in your heart.

question_tagalog: Paano kita matutulungan na mas mahalin pa yung sarili mo?
question_english: How can I help you love yourself even more?
quote_tagalog: Gagabayan kita palagi pataas.
quote_english: I will always guide you up.

question_tagalog: Anong habit ng ibang tao ang gusto mong ma-adapt?
question_english: What habit from others do you want to adapt?
quote_tagalog: Laging may room for improvement.
quote_english: Always room for improvement.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo masasabing 'successful' ka na in life?
question_english: When can you say you're 'successful' in life?
quote_tagalog: Ang success ay peace of mind.
quote_english: Success is peace of mind.

question_tagalog: Ano yung pumipigil sayo minsan na maging full potential mo?
question_english: What stops you sometimes from reaching your full potential?
quote_tagalog: Kaya mong lagpasan ang takot mo.
quote_english: You can overcome your fear.

question_tagalog: Ano yung bagay na nakaka-proud sa family mo and upbringing mo?
question_english: What makes you proud of your family and upbringing?
quote_tagalog: Ang pamilya ang pundasyon natin.
quote_english: Family is our foundation.

question_tagalog: Ano yung gusto mong matandaan ng tao about you?
question_english: What do you want people to remember about you?
quote_tagalog: Iwanan ang mundo ng may magandang alaala.
quote_english: Leave the world with beautiful memories.

question_tagalog: Anong word ang pinaka-favorite mo at bakit?
question_english: What is your favorite word and why?
quote_tagalog: Mga simpleng salita, may malalim na meaning.
quote_english: Simple words, deep meaning.

question_tagalog: Pano mo sina-celebrate yung small wins mo?
question_english: How do you celebrate your small wins?
quote_tagalog: Big or small, progress is progress.
quote_english: Big or small, progress is progress.

question_tagalog: Ano yung thought na laging nagpapa-smile sayo from nowhere?
question_english: What thought always makes you smile out of nowhere?
quote_tagalog: Smile lang lagi, bagay sayo.
quote_english: Just always smile, it suits you.

question_tagalog: Anong quality ko ang nag-influence sayo to be better?
question_english: What quality of mine influenced you to be better?
quote_tagalog: Hahawaan kita ng magagandang vibes.
quote_english: I will infect you with good vibes.

question_tagalog: Ano yung personal boundaries mo na ayaw mong ma-cross ng kahit sino?
question_english: What are your personal boundaries that you don't want crossed?
quote_tagalog: Nirerespeto ko lagi ang space mo.
quote_english: I always respect your space.

question_tagalog: Paano mo nabe-balance ang work at personal life mo?
question_english: How do you balance your work and personal life?
quote_tagalog: Wag kalimutan mabuhay habang nagtatrabaho.
quote_english: Don't forget to live while working.

question_tagalog: Ano yung the best advice na nakuha mo sa magulang mo?
question_english: What's the best advice you got from your parents?
quote_tagalog: Gabay natin ang aral ng nakaraan.
quote_english: The lessons of the past guide us.

question_tagalog: Anong libro, movie, o kanta ang bumago sa pananaw mo?
question_english: What book, movie, or song changed your perspective?
quote_tagalog: Minsan art ang nagbubukas sa isip natin.
quote_english: Sometimes art opens our minds.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo masasabi na fully healed ka na on something?
question_english: When can you say you're fully healed on something?
quote_tagalog: Healing takes time, no rush.
quote_english: Healing takes time, no rush.

question_tagalog: Ano yung pangarap mong destination para makapag soul-searching?
question_english: What's your dream destination for soul-searching?
quote_tagalog: Kahit saan, basta tahimik.
quote_english: Anywhere, as long as it's quiet.

question_tagalog: Anong aspect ng buhay mo yung feeling mo in-control ka na ngayon?
question_english: What aspect of your life do you feel you are in control of now?
quote_tagalog: Hawak mo ang manibela ng buhay mo.
quote_english: You hold the steering wheel of your life.

question_tagalog: Paano mo natatanggap yung mga flaws mo?
question_english: How do you accept your flaws?
quote_tagalog: Yung flaws mo ang nagpapaganda sayo.
quote_english: Your flaws make you beautiful.

question_tagalog: Anong quote or mantra yung lagi mong baon sa araw-araw?
question_english: What quote or mantra do you carry with you every day?
quote_tagalog: Isang magandang paalala para sa puso.
quote_english: A beautiful reminder for the heart.

question_tagalog: Ano yung bagay na kaya mo nang i-let go ngayon?
question_english: What is something you can let go of now?
quote_tagalog: Bitawan ang mabigat para makalipad.
quote_english: Release the heavy to be able to fly.

question_tagalog: Ano yung mas napapahalagahan mo ngayon kaysa dati?
question_english: What do you value more now than before?
quote_tagalog: Ang oras at peace of mind ay mahalaga.
quote_english: Time and peace of mind are precious.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo naramdaman na nag-grow na talaga yung maturity mo?
question_english: When did you feel your maturity really grew?
quote_tagalog: Mas malawak na ang pang-unawa mo ngayon.
quote_english: Your understanding is broader now.

question_tagalog: Ano yung ginagawa mo pag feel mo nawawala ka sa sarili mo?
question_english: What do you do when you feel lost in yourself?
quote_tagalog: Babalik din ang lahat sa ayos.
quote_english: Everything will fall back into place.

question_tagalog: Anong passion mo na gusto mo ulit balikan o simulan?
question_english: What passion do you want to return to or start?
quote_tagalog: Sundin mo ang sinisigaw ng puso mo.
quote_english: Follow what your heart screams.

question_tagalog: Paano mo nilalabanan yung negative thoughts mo?
question_english: How do you fight your negative thoughts?
quote_tagalog: Mas malakas ang positive minds.
quote_english: Positive minds are stronger.

question_tagalog: Ano yung greatest achievement mo that no one knows about?
question_english: What's your greatest achievement that no one knows about?
quote_tagalog: Silent victories are still victories.
quote_english: Silent victories are still victories.

question_tagalog: Paano mo ina-comfort yung sarili mo pag mag-isa ka?
question_english: How do you comfort yourself when you're alone?
quote_tagalog: Mahigpit na yakap para sa sarili.
quote_english: A tight hug for yourself.

question_tagalog: Kailan mo masasabing tunay na malaya ka na sa mga worries mo?
question_english: When can you say you are truly free from your worries?
quote_tagalog: Hinga nang malalim, bitawan ang kaba.
quote_english: Breathe deeply, let go of the nervousness.

question_tagalog: Ano yung meaning ng 'happiness' para sayo ngayon?
question_english: What is the meaning of 'happiness' for you now?
quote_tagalog: Ang kaligayahan ay nasa simpleng bagay.
quote_english: Happiness is in simple things.

question_tagalog: Paano mo tinatrato yung sarili mo after a long tiring day?
question_english: How do you treat yourself after a long tiring day?
quote_tagalog: Deserve mo ang magpahinga.
quote_english: You deserve to rest.

question_tagalog: Anong pinaka gusto mong mangyari sa personal growth mo in the next 3 months?
question_english: What do you most want to happen in your personal growth in the next 3 months?
quote_tagalog: Aasahan ko ang patuloy mong pag-unlad.
quote_english: I look forward to your continuous progress.
